title: Karnataka Coasts & Coffee
shortDescription: Lush coffee plantations meeting pristine beaches.
overview: From the misty coffee estates of Coorg to the laid-back beaches of Gokarna and the towering Shiva statue at Murudeshwar, this trip offers diverse experiences.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Mangalore to Coorg
itinerary.description: Drive to Coorg, relax in estate.

itinerary.title: Coorg Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Abbey Falls, Raja's Seat, Dubare Elephant Camp.

itinerary.title: Drive to Murudeshwar
itinerary.description: Visit the majestic Shiva Temple on the coast.

itinerary.title: Gokarna Beaches
itinerary.description: Beach hopping: Om Beach, Kudle Beach.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day
itinerary.description: Relax by the beach or try yoga.
